name: Cyberware Fleet Monitor
description: Deploy + supervise the cross-node fleet dashboard (fleetdash) as a self-healing service, and report its health. Perk-agnostic lifecycle (ready -> prepared -> verified -> executed); the perk supplies the concrete, contract-bound how.

prepared.description: inputs validated — required vars present, runtime + store reachable

verified.description: the plan is contract-bound — tool sequence resolves and its contract is in place

executed.description: the perk's tool sequence ran ONLY via executor.py — recorded to the run-ledger as it runs

g_executed.description: ran only through the recording executor
